title: Add to Analysis Button with Premium Upgrade Modal for Multi-Dashboard
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see an 'Add to Analysis' button on each dashboard with a clear upgrade prompt when I try to analyze multiple dashboards, so that I understand the free tier limitation and know multi-dashboard analysis is a future premium feature.
description:
Rename the dashboard selection action to 'Add to Analysis'. When a user clicks a second dashboard, show a modal that reads:

'Currently the free version of DataTools Pro will analyze 1 dashboard at a time.'

The modal has an 'OK' button to close it and a disabled/grayed-out 'Upgrade' button with a tooltip: 'Multi-dashboard analysis coming soon to DataTools Pro team edition.'
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard selection button reads 'Add to Analysis'
Selecting a second dashboard triggers a limitation modal
Modal displays the free-tier limitation message
Upgrade button is visible but disabled/grayed out
Disabled Upgrade button has a tooltip about team edition
ux_changes: Renamed dashboard action to 'Add to Analysis'. Added a premium upgrade modal that appears when selecting a second dashboard, with an OK button and a disabled Upgrade button with tooltip.
implementation_notes: This implements the monetization touchpoint for multi-dashboard analysis as a premium feature.
comment_summary: Developer added the modal and pushed to staging.
